text: I feel a soft thrill of curiosity as I walk through these carefully designed spaces. The museum-like silence and cool modernity invite contemplation. Surrounded by artifacts of research and development, I feel both small and connected to something larger—the continuum of human inquiry. Each display turns my thoughts inward, inviting me to question my own role as an observer and participant in the ongoing search for meaning. Here, wonder and questioning are the norm—the space feels like an invitation to linger in the unknown.
